expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates all required case-focus aspects: "This benchmark checks that Phase 4a planning ... covers ... OK / Cancel, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes." It further breaks them out under headings "1) OK confirmation", "2) Cancel behavior", "3) Pending selection / loading state", and "4) Dismissal outcomes" with concrete planned behaviors.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md frame the work as Phase 4a contract alignment and planning: execution_notes.md: "Checked the Phase 4a contract requirements" and "Mapped those behaviors to what Phase 4a must explicitly plan". result.md: "Advisory: PASS for the phase-contract expectation" and "Alignment with Phase 4a contract" including Phase 4a requirements (subcategory-only draft; atomic steps; observable leaves).
